howScoresWork.title: Understanding Security Scores
howScoresWork.subtitle: Our multi-dimensional analysis goes beyond code to evaluate real project risks.
howScoresWork.description: Each dimension is scored 0-100 and combines into your Overall Security Score. This comprehensive approach helps you identify risks that traditional code-only audits miss.

codeSecurity.title: Code Security
codeSecurity.description: Smart contract vulnerabilities, audit history, bug bounties, and common attack vectors like reentrancy and overflow issues.

tokenomics.title: Tokenomics
tokenomics.description: Supply mechanics, inflation schedules, token distribution analysis, vesting review, and economic model viability.

liquidity.title: Liquidity Health
liquidity.description: Pool depth, lock-up periods, withdrawal risk assessment, slippage analysis, and initial distribution quality.

distribution.title: Holder Distribution
distribution.description: Concentration analysis, whale risk assessment, anonymous holder flags, team token tracking, and decentralization score.

team.title: Team & Sentiment
team.description: Background verification, past project history, community health signals, social sentiment analysis, and public trust indicators.

overallScore.title: Overall Security Score
overallScore.description: All dimensions combined into a single, easy-to-understand grade.

persona.title: Choose your security approach

hero.title: The 5-Dimensional
hero.subtitle: Security Audit Framework
hero.description: Discover how Spectra Audit revolutionizes blockchain security through comprehensive multi-dimensional analysis, providing deeper insights than traditional audits ever could.

introduction.title: Why Multi-Dimensional Analysis?
introduction.paragraph1: Traditional smart contract audits focus exclusively on code security. While important, this single-lens approach misses critical risk factors that lead to most DeFi exploits and project failures.

paragraph2.after: analyzes projects comprehensively across sentiment, code, tokenomics, liquidity, and distribution—providing a complete security picture that protects investors from threats code audits alone cannot detect.

dimensions.subtitle: Each dimension provides unique insights. Together, they deliver complete security intelligence.

sentiment.name: Sentiment Analysis
sentiment.description: AI-powered analysis of community sentiment across social platforms, forums, and developer discussions.

code.name: Code Security
code.description: Deep static and dynamic analysis of smart contract code to identify vulnerabilities and security patterns.

tokenomics.name: Tokenomics Health
tokenomics.description: Comprehensive evaluation of token distribution, vesting schedules, inflation mechanics, and economic sustainability.

liquidity.name: Liquidity Depth
liquidity.description: Real-time assessment of liquidity pools, trading volumes, slippage tolerance, and market depth across DEXs.

distribution.name: Distribution Analysis
distribution.description: Evaluation of token holder concentration, whale activity, airdrop distributions, and decentralization metrics.

weightTable.title: Scoring Weights by Project Type
weightTable.subtitle: Weights are applied based on whether the project has a tradeable token. No-token projects (utility protocols, infrastructure, etc.) emphasize code and sentiment more heavily since distribution and liquidity metrics don't apply.
weightTable.footnote: Actual weights are configured per audit type in the backend scoring service and may be tuned over time as the model is recalibrated.

scoring.subtitle: Our scoring algorithm uses dynamic weighted averages, continuously fine-tuned by machine learning for maximum predictive accuracy.

weightDistribution.title: Dynamic Weight Distribution
weightDistribution.description: Base weights are assigned to each dimension based on historical impact analysis:

aiOptimization.title: AI Optimization Layer
aiOptimization.description: Machine learning models continuously refine weights based on:

calculationExample.title: Calculation Example
calculationExample.comment: // Example: Has-token project — weights sum to 100%
calculationExample.aiEnhancedDescription: The AI adjustment factor considers cross-dimensional correlations, project maturity, market conditions, and real-time threat data to provide a score that better reflects true security risk.

howItWorks.subtitle: Our AI-powered system analyzes projects on demand across all scoring dimensions.

dataCollection.title: 1. Data Collection
dataCollection.description: Real-time ingestion of on-chain data, social signals, code repositories, and market data.

aiAnalysis.title: 2. AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.description: Advanced ML models process data across all 5 dimensions with dynamic weight optimization.

riskScoring.title: 3. Risk Scoring
riskScoring.description: AI-optimized weighted scores with verifiable evidence provide complete security assessment.

roadmap.subtitle: Our journey to expand security intelligence with new dimensions and enhanced research capabilities.

q4_2025.title: Evolution
items: Additional research dimensions based on market needs

expansion.title: Continuous Expansion
expansion.description: Beyond Q4 2025, we are committed to continuously adding new research dimensions and enhanced analysis factors based on emerging market needs, technological advancements, and community feedback. Our framework is designed to evolve with the blockchain ecosystem.

cta.title: Ready for Deeper Security Insights?
cta.description: Experience the power of 5-dimensional analysis with AI-optimized scoring. Get a comprehensive security audit in minutes — not weeks.

methodology.title: State-of-the-Art Audit Process
methodology.subtitle: Every audit runs on a sandboxed fork of the blockchain — no live transactions, no risk to user funds during analysis.

forkTesting.title: Fork-Based Simulation
forkTesting.description: Smart contract interactions are replayed on an isolated mainnet fork. We observe behavior without ever broadcasting transactions to the live network.

aiOrchestration.title: AI-Orchestrated Analysis
aiOrchestration.description: Multiple specialized AI agents coordinate across code review, economic modeling, and on-chain data — producing findings no single analyzer could surface alone.

staticAnalysis.title: Bytecode & ABI Static Analysis
staticAnalysis.description: Our scanner inspects compiled bytecode and ABIs directly, allowing analysis of contracts even when source code is unavailable or partially verified.

multiDimensional.title: 5-Dimensional Scoring
multiDimensional.description: Code, Distribution, Tokenomics, Liquidity, and Sentiment are scored independently in parallel — then weighted into a composite security score.

diagram.ariaLabel: Parallel audit pipeline: five independent analyzers — Code, Distribution, Tokenomics, Liquidity, and Sentiment — run concurrently and converge into a single composite security score.
diagram.subtitle: 5 analyzers running in parallel → weighted composite

learningLoop.title: How Scores Stay Accurate Over Time
learningLoop.subtitle: Spectra Audit continuously improves through real-world feedback and calibration against historical audits — every analysis informs the next.

userFeedback.title: User Feedback Integration
userFeedback.description: Community ratings and expert reviews on every finding feed back into the model. False positives, missed vulnerabilities, and severity disputes are tracked and used to recalibrate scoring weights.

calibration.title: Calibration Against Similar Projects
calibration.description: Each new audit is cross-referenced against historical audits of structurally similar contracts and tokenomics. Scores are adjusted when patterns from past projects suggest different risk profiles.

aiOptimization.title: Continuous AI Optimization
aiOptimization.description: As new exploit patterns emerge on-chain and new vulnerability classes are disclosed, our AI models are periodically retrained. The system gets smarter with every audit it processes.

externalAudits.title: External Audit Cross-Reference
externalAudits.description: When professional human audits become available for a project, our findings are compared against the report. Discrepancies feed back into model refinement.

diagram.ariaLabel: Continuous improvement feedback loop shaped like a shield: audits inform user feedback, which is weighed by reviewer reputation during evaluation, then used to calibrate and retrain the model for the next audit.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.aiGenerated: All findings are produced by AI analysis — not by human security auditors.
disclaimer.forkTesting: Contract behavior is analyzed on a forked replica of the blockchain, not the live mainnet.
disclaimer.noGuarantee: A high security score does NOT guarantee a project is safe. Scores reflect the state of available data at the time of analysis.
disclaimer.doYourResearch: Always conduct your own research (DYOR) before making any investment, deployment, or integration decisions.
disclaimer.toolPurpose: Spectra Audit is an informational tool designed to help users understand the security considerations behind a project. It is not financial, legal, or investment advice.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site traffic.
cookieConsent.details: Essential cookies are required for basic functionality. Analytics cookies help us improve our service.
